<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below.
For docs-only changes, the test plan and checklist can be brief.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? 1–3 sentences. -->

## Related Issue

<!-- Link to the issue this PR addresses, e.g. "Fixes #123" or "Refs #456". -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Test Plan

<!-- How was this verified? List the commands you ran and any new tests added. -->

- [ ] `dotnet build --configuration Release` passes
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes (unit + integration)
- [ ] `dotnet format --verify-no-changes` passes
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality (or N/A)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the patterns documented in [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) and [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)
- [ ] I have updated documentation where applicable (README, CLAUDE.md, XML doc comments)
- [ ] I have not committed secrets or local config files
